# Direct dependencies. Pip will resolve transitives (lxml, cffi, pillow, etc.).
PyYAML>=6.0
qrcode>=7.4
Pillow>=10.0
python-docx>=1.0
weasyprint>=60.0,<69  # 69.0 regresses PDF/UA 7.21.5 (Apple-Color-Emoji glyph widths); pin <69 until fixed + re-validated with verapdf
pypdf>=4.0
# Used only for QR-code byte-match verification in tests / debug
opencv-python-headless>=4.8
